problem: Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal?
hypothesis: If Psychedelic-induced neuroplasticity via 5-HT2A receptor is applied to reversed, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 6 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
